issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnPlay' (card ability activates when entering the field), not 'Activated' (which implies a player-triggered activated ability)

Condition type 'HasRestingDon' is incorrect. The effect requires DON!! payment (−1), which should be represented as a cost condition, not a board state check. Should verify cost mechanism in DSL spec or use appropriate cost representation

Action sequence is incomplete. After DrawCard, the TrashFromHand should execute, but the DSL lacks clarity on whether both actions fire or if there's a conditional dependency. Per card text, both should execute in sequence
